Pebble app initialization, configuration, event handling, and compilation rules.


## Files
- **[index.js](index.js.md)**: Initializes a Pebble event listener to log a message when the application is ready.
- **[main.c](main.c.md)**: Initializes a Pebble app with button click handlers and a text layer for user interaction.
- **[package.json](package.json.md)**: Configuration for a Pebble app with metadata, dependencies, and target platforms.
- **[simple.c](simple.c.md)**: A simple Pebble app that runs an event loop.
- **[worker.c](worker.c.md)**: Initializes and runs the worker event loop for Pebble firmware.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Default rules to compile a Pebble application, with options for platform-specific and universal configurations.
